endpoints.description: NetEase Yanxuan product search API. Use keyword, page, size, floorPrice, upperPrice, sortType, categoryId, descSorted and matchType query params. browser_api_call compacts the result into product ids, names, prices, sellVolume, material-like attrs, thread count hints, specs and detail URLs.
strategy_notes: For search/filter/ranking tasks, call the search API first with keyword plus floorPrice/upperPrice and size=40.
If pagination says totalPage>1, call only the next page needed to collect candidates, then rank locally by sellVolume.
Use detail calls only for the top ranked candidates whose compact search fields already satisfy price and material hints.
If rating/commentGoodRates is missing after compact search plus top detail calls, report it as not exposed instead of opening many product pages.

endpoints.description: NetEase Yanxuan comment APIs. itemGoodRates returns goodCmtRate/star/default-good count; listByItem and listByItemByTag return comment stars, content snippets, sku info and pagination; tags returns comment tag counts. Use this instead of opening product pages just to click the review tab.
strategy_notes: After selecting top candidates from search/detail compact rows, call itemGoodRates and listByItem for only those candidates.
Use star/avgStar/goodCmtRate as rating evidence; use comment content and tags as user-good-keyword evidence.
If both itemGoodRates and listByItem expose no rating or comments, mark rating/keywords as not shown for that candidate and move on.
Do not open the product detail review tab unless the comment API fails.

endpoints.description: NetEase Yanxuan product detail HTML. The page contains var JSON_DATA_FROMFTL; browser_api_call compacts it into product id/name, retailPrice, sellVolume, commentCount, material, thread_count, attrs, specs, and SKU samples. Use after collecting candidate item ids from the search/list page.
strategy_notes: Prefer the /xhr/search/search API to collect and rank candidates first; use this endpoint only for top detail verification.
Use the visible/search page to collect item ids only if the search API is unavailable, then call this endpoint for at most 8-10 candidates.
Rank by sellVolume when the task asks for销量; filter by retailPrice and material/thread_count from the compacted detail.

If commentGoodRates or review keywords are empty in the compacted detail and a single comment-interface check does not expose them, record that the field was not shown rather than trying more regex variants.
